title: taraxacum officinale var. lividum
intro: Taraxacum officinale var. lividum, commonly known as the livid dandelion, is a variety of the dandelion plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant agent. The health benefits of livid dandelion include supporting kidney function, reducing blood pressure, and aiding in the digestion process. Livid dandelion can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
